reviews.comment:
Quiero destacar la buenaa ubicacion que. tiene de acceso facil, tiene varios surtidores y. sobre. todo dos bombas de gas para los neumatico que es la unica que tiene de la zona sin que te cobre un solo peso y sin importar si consumis o no. La atencion que tienen los chicos de la bomba es muy buena cuando esta muy colapsado o no. En YPF Boxer ea muy bueno tambien nos dejan el auto impecable ideal para salir a la ruta. La atencion de los chicos del shop es muy buena tambien. Siempre hay alguna promocion. Destacos las medialunas

(Translated by Google)
I want to highlight its excellent location. It's easily accessible, has several gas pumps, and, above all, two tire inflation pumps, which are the only ones in the area that don't charge a single peso, regardless of whether you use any fuel or not. The service at the pump is very good, whether it's busy or not. The YPF Boxer service is also very good; they leave your car spotless, perfect for a road trip. The service at the convenience store is also very good. There's always some kind of promotion. I especially recommend the croissants.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNNcTdpNTJRRRAB
